# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: website-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: ${PROJECT_ID}-website-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    iamPolicy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - allUsers
    labels:
      environment: production
      created-by: deployment-manager
      website: true
    cors:
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: GET
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: HEAD
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: OPTIONS
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: POST
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: PUT
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: DELETE
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: PATCH
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: MERGE
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: PROPFIND
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: PROPPATCH
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: MKCOL
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: COPY
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: MOVE
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: LOCK
      origin: '*'
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: UNLOCK
      origin: '*'
